decisions.rationale: Valid Bubble field-key gap: onboarding_data stores orientationScore (camelCase) while calculateUserClassification reads orientation_score1_number via readNumberField, which falls back to results.orientation_score. completeOnboarding sets results.orientation_score from computeResults before runOnboardingProfilePipeline runs, so AC-2 and FV-2 pass in the onboarding flow. Persisting orientation_score1_number to onboarding_data (matching bTHzC user.orientation_score1_number sourcing) is AUTH-04/completeOnboarding persistence contract work, outside API-02 target_files; API-03-pressure-profile depends_on gate needs patched classification_option_classification_os, not orientation field key parity.

Prototype computeResults still derives results.classification via classification.ts heuristics before saveOnboarding, then calculateUserClassification overwrites classification and classification_option_classification_os synchronously in the same completeOnboarding call before navigate. Transient mismatch is sub-millisecond and never observed by downstream consumers (API-03+, DASH-02) that read post-pipeline profile state. Skipping prototype classification in computeResults is completeOnboarding brownfield integration polish, not in API-02 decompose scope or target_files.

No unit tests for resolveClassificationOs branch ordering at 3.2/3.8 boundaries or comfortable_plateau orientation <= 3 gate. Testing is not in API-02 acceptance criteria; review priority is low. criteria_audit AC-1 passes with Bubble-grounded evidence in classifyUser.ts; functional audit FV-1 passes. Add classifyUser.test.ts in a dedicated test wave — does not block API-03 advance.

Coverage preflight gaps[] documents pre-rewrite AC-1/AC-2 failures that criteria_audit now marks pass at 100% coverage. This is stale cycle-artifact metadata, not an implementation defect — per triage AC-quality rules, preflight label refresh on next coverage run is housekeeping and does not require API-02 rewrite.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, all ACs pass, no blockers. Deferred: C-1 orientation_score1_number persistence to AUTH-04/completeOnboarding; C-2 prototype computeResults transient classification in completeOnboarding brownfield polish; C-3 classifyUser unit tests (out of AC scope). Accepted: C-4 stale preflight gaps in coverage JSON (resolved criteria, artifact refresh only).
